name: Enzyme Catalysis
description: Enzyme Catalysis process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.

graph TD

W3 --> Y3[Optimization Process]
X3 --> Z3[Enzymatic Efficiency]
Y3 --> Z3
